race.description: Isle Of Capri Wine & Beer Open Handicap
race.comment: TALTARNI FIELDS (3) put in a rare bad one two back then made amends with a tough win over 1110m at Doomben three weeks ago. Drops 3kgs to move into open company which looks a lovely weight for a horse with his record. Effective at this trip and can win again. KING YOSHI (5) stalked the leader then let down impressively to easily take care of open class sprinters over this trip at the Sunshine Coast recently. Meets a better field today but his 1000m credentials are hard to fault. POWER OF THE BRAVE (8) and WANDA ROX (1) quinellaed a 1000m race at Eagle Farm four weeks ago, the latter getting home by 0.6 lengths.  Both horses are racing in great heart and excel at this trip. Not a lot will separate them again.
